code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
let n = tokens.len()

mut best: Int = 0
mut best_abs: Int = 0
mut have: Bool = false
mut i: Int = 0
while i < n
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    mut a = v
    if a < 0
      a = -a
    end
    if not have
      best = v
      best_abs = a
      have = true
    else if a < best_abs
      best = v
      best_abs = a
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("min_abs=#{best}")
